text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #38)

[Just correcting the mistaken "/" to be a "-".]

Note, both:

/stable-armv7-alt-chroot

/stable-armv7-alt-poud
(the poudriere jail stable-armv7-alt 's world)

are populated with installs of the world built
with the 2 patches involved.
